classificationPolicy.IMPLEMENTED_AND_VERIFIED: Implementation exists, persistent authority is identified, automated verification and a CI workflow are present.
classificationPolicy.IMPLEMENTED_NOT_VERIFIED: Implementation exists, but the required production-like acceptance target has not been measured.
classificationPolicy.PARTIAL: Only part of the required capability or proof is present.
classificationPolicy.FAIL_CLOSED: The capability is deliberately unavailable until a trusted dependency or credential exists.
classificationPolicy.MOCK_ONLY: Only a sandbox, adapter contract or simulated dependency exists; no live claim is allowed.
classificationPolicy.LEGACY: Retired or non-authoritative behavior still affects repository or release state.
classificationPolicy.DUPLICATE_AUTHORITY: More than one mutable source of truth is reachable in the same release mode.
classificationPolicy.OUT_OF_RELEASE_SCOPE: Explicitly excluded from this technical release program.

capabilities.name: Release status and obsolete deploy integrations
capabilities.finding: The current main commit still receives failed Deno and Vercel external statuses although those contours are not release authorities.
capabilities.nextGate: Remove or disable obsolete GitHub App/webhook status publishers and verify a clean exact-head combined status.

capabilities.name: Persistent authentication, session rotation, revocation and MFA
capabilities.finding: Persistent sessions, one-time refresh rotation, revocation and MFA have a PostgreSQL-backed CI gate.
capabilities.nextGate: Retain as a blocking gate and include auth evidence in the release manifest.

capabilities.name: Membership-derived roles, object authorization and tenant isolation
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL memberships, deal participants and RLS
capabilities.finding: The canonical transaction path resolves role and tenant from server authority and exercises the twelve-role scenario under PostgreSQL RLS.
capabilities.nextGate: Expand the negative object-level matrix to every public command endpoint and preserve zero tenant escape.

capabilities.name: Canonical Deal aggregate, idempotency, optimistic concurrency and atomic command pipeline
capabilities.finding: Business state, hash-chained audit, outbox receipt, idempotency result and money effects are committed through the canonical PostgreSQL command path with version-CAS.
capabilities.nextGate: Prove every remaining write endpoint routes through this authority or is fail-closed in industrial mode.

capabilities.name: Auction admission, immutable bidding, deterministic close and atomic Deal creation
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL read authority; command completeness not yet fully evidenced
capabilities.finding: PostgreSQL lot, bid and award state is visible and the one-deal path includes auction milestones, but a dedicated concurrent bid/close/winner worker acceptance suite was not found.
capabilities.nextGate: Add atomic bid placement and close commands with idempotency, edge-of-close rules, deterministic tie-break, two-closer race and worker-restart proof.

capabilities.name: Carrier assignment, trip lifecycle, arrival, weighing and acceptance
capabilities.finding: The canonical lifecycle persists assignment, loading, transit, arrival, weight and acceptance, but dedicated overlap, replacement and duplicate-arrival race proofs are incomplete.
capabilities.nextGate: Add conflicting assignment, driver overlap, carrier replacement, duplicate arrival and crash-between-state-and-outbox tests.

capabilities.name: Laboratory lifecycle, versions and evidence binding
capabilities.finding: Laboratory state is persisted and independently exercised through a PostgreSQL authority test and the full Deal lifecycle.
capabilities.nextGate: Retain supersede and evidence-hash invariants as blocking migration and E2E checks.

capabilities.name: Document storage, immutable evidence chain, retention and recovery
capabilities.authority: Durable metadata exists; external object immutability is not proven
capabilities.finding: Deal evidence references and durable metadata exist, but WORM/Object Lock, antivirus enforcement, signed URL isolation, retention and object restore drill are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Implement and test S3-compatible immutable object storage, MIME/size/AV gates, tombstones, critical download audit and restore reconciliation.

capabilities.name: Internal settlement authority, bigint ledger, signed callbacks and reconciliation
capabilities.authority: PostgreSQL append-only ledger and callback registry
capabilities.finding: Internal reserve/release authority uses integer minor units, signed idempotent callbacks, append-only ledger and reconciliation without claiming live money movement.
capabilities.nextGate: Preserve fail-closed live status and add provider-contract acceptance only after external credentials exist.

capabilities.name: Dispute, money freeze, evidence, partial resolution and superseding decisions
capabilities.finding: Dispute-related persistence exists, but the required partial dispute, freeze, superseding decision and release/refund scenario is not fully represented in the current mandatory one-deal flow.
capabilities.nextGate: Add a complete positive and negative dispute lifecycle with money freeze and immutable superseding decision proof.

capabilities.name: Atomic audit, transactional outbox and durable multi-worker processing
capabilities.finding: Atomic write coupling, append-only event history, lease, retry, dead-letter and multi-worker recovery are covered by the industrial core gate.
capabilities.nextGate: Add release evidence for poison-message isolation, backlog recovery time and manual redrive authorization.

capabilities.name: Structured logs, metrics, traces, alerts and business monitoring
capabilities.finding: An observability E2E exists, but end-to-end trace propagation, secret redaction, production alert routing and all required business alerts are not yet accepted on production-like topology.
capabilities.nextGate: Prove request-to-worker-to-callback traces and executable alerts for 5xx, p99, DB saturation, outbox lag, money invariant, audit absence and restore failure.

capabilities.name: Target load profile and measured scalability
capabilities.finding: A concurrency/load proof exists, but the required 5,000 sessions, 500 RPS for 30 minutes, 1,000 RPS burst, 50,000 deals and 10 million events have not been measured.
capabilities.nextGate: Run a reproducible production-like load suite, fix bottlenecks and persist before/after raw evidence tied to artifact digest.

capabilities.name: Automated fault injection and recovery invariants
capabilities.finding: Worker lease recovery and race behavior are tested, but API/worker termination, PostgreSQL failover, storage timeout, pool exhaustion and restart-under-load are not a complete automated suite.
capabilities.nextGate: Create deterministic fault scenarios with post-failure invariant verification and no manual database repair.

capabilities.name: Backup, restore and disaster recovery measurement
capabilities.finding: A backup/restore rehearsal and manifest exist for ephemeral PostgreSQL, but encrypted retention, object metadata recovery, regional topology and measured RPO/RTO targets are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Run isolated encrypted restore drills on production-like topology and record machine-verifiable RPO/RTO without extrapolation.

capabilities.name: Blocking SAST, dependency, secret, container, IaC and abuse-case verification
capabilities.finding: SAST, Trivy and performance smoke steps currently tolerate failures or use non-blocking exit codes; the release gate therefore does not yet enforce the stated Critical/High policy.
capabilities.nextGate: Make Critical findings, missing container build and required abuse tests blocking; add IaC scan, API fuzzing, callback replay and tenant escape gates.

capabilities.name: Reproducible production-like infrastructure, immutable artifact, deploy and rollback
capabilities.finding: Build and health primitives exist, but a fully reproducible local/CI/staging/production topology, immutable image promotion, schema compatibility gate and rollback acceptance are not proven.
capabilities.nextGate: Add production-like IaC, build-once promotion, readiness, graceful termination, migration gate, smoke, rollback and artifact digest evidence.

capabilities.name: Design System v8 browser matrix, mobile-first behavior, RU/EN/ZH and accessibility
capabilities.finding: The final Design System v8 browser and accessibility matrix is merged at the baseline commit without claiming production operation.
capabilities.nextGate: Keep the matrix blocking for all transaction-critical UI changes and add command-conflict UX scenarios.

capabilities.name: FGIS, EDO, GIS EPD, ESIA, bank and other live adapters
capabilities.finding: Internal contracts and sandbox paths exist; live credentials, legal connectivity and real provider acceptance are external gates and must not be represented as connected.
capabilities.nextGate: Keep all unavailable adapters fail-closed with explicit designed/sandbox/live status and execute provider acceptance only after external access is granted.

capabilities.name: Release evidence bound to commit, environment and artifact digest
capabilities.finding: Several logs and manifests are uploaded, but there is no single release manifest binding JUnit, scan results, load evidence, RTO/RPO, container digest, deployment digest and exact-head workflows.
capabilities.nextGate: Generate a signed machine-readable release evidence index keyed by commit SHA, environment and immutable artifact digest.
